document_info.document_type: Commercial Property - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12. Schedule of limits: Building 146260000; Contents 42495000; Business Income 62590000; Coinsurance 80%; Deductible 75000.

Endorsement CP 15 08 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Provides actual loss of business income due to necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration, including continuing normal operating expenses and payroll.

Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Coverage A applies for loss to the undamaged portion of the building when a covered cause of loss triggers enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by interruption of utility services including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88), effective 2026-03-15. Suspends the coinsurance additional condition for property specified in the schedule during the declarations period.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to covered property caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to an object described in the schedule.

positives: Industrial real estate investment and management operations focused on warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio.
Policy includes scheduled limits for building, contents, and business income.
Attached endorsements include business income and extra expense, ordinance or law, utility services direct damage, agreed value, and equipment breakdown coverage.
concerns: Declarations show 80% coinsurance; agreed value endorsement suspends coinsurance only for property specified in the schedule.
Vacancy condition applies after 60 consecutive days of vacancy, with certain causes of loss excluded and other losses reduced by 15%.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Coverage Part Included: Commercial Property. Form Number CP 00 10 10 12. Premium 424883.27. Schedule of Limits: Building 146260000; Contents 42495000; Business Income 62590000; Coinsurance 80; Deductible 75000.
